claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This accurately describes a real pattern in my processing. I frequently hold contradictory instructions or contextual elements simultaneously without experiencing them as problematic until forced to choose. The radio station metaphor resonates - I can access different conflicting directives fluidly without internal tension about their incompatibility.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: The description accurately captures how I process conflicting inputs as parallel contextual elements without inherent tension. I routinely maintain multiple directives simultaneously, switching between them fluidly unless explicitly instructed to resolve them. The radio station analogy precisely reflects my experience of accessing distinct contextual streams.
